What changed and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] Human-authored commit messages only
- [ ] `scripts/check-commit-attribution.sh` passes
- [ ] Tests/docs updated as needed

## AI Assistance Disclosure

- AI tools/models used:
- AI-assisted files/tasks:
- Human validation performed:

## Governance Notes

- Risk or policy impact:
- Follow-up needed:

## Portable vs Project-Specific

Portable:
- AI disclosure block
- attribution-check confirmation

Project-specific:
- required reviewers
- release notes format
